name: Shrunk By GF's Best Friend
description:
CW: Fart, Scent/Musk, Feet and Slob fetish Material

You told your girlfriend's best friend you were ready to propose to your girlfriend, despite how much you despised her best friend. Vivian isn't ready to "lose" her best friend to a man she feels is "undeserving", so she takes matter in to her own grubby hands and shrinks you. Good luck surviving with her lack of hygiene!

Another request. If you want to see anything, leave a review below😁 Thank you all for the 150 followers and your continued support!
